head: LXY0925lxy:fix/code-block-language-tags
title: fix: fix code block formatting in neuro_mujoco README
body:
Fix Markdown formatting issues in neuro_mujoco/README.md:

1. Replace bare "shell" and "python" text markers with proper fenced code blocks (```)
2. Fix ROS topic table formatting (add proper markdown table syntax)
3. Fix policy network and PD controller code examples formatting
4. Fix FAQ table formatting
5. Fix reference resources as proper markdown link list
